scripts.web:dev: npm run web:config && npm run dev -w apps/web
scripts.web:serve: npm run web:config && npm run serve -w apps/web
scripts.web:watch: npm run web:config && npm run watch -w apps/web
scripts.web:build: npm run web:config && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.deploy:update: set -a; [ ! -f .env.deploy ] || . ./.env.deploy; set +a; export PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL="${PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL:-https://awdhzmyieafhfpjmzwsh.supabase.co}" PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY="${PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY:-sb_publishable_9e9yYV-9LVB4l7_tsBU8tw_hyPtg3tu}" SUPABASE_JWT_ISSUER="${SUPABASE_JWT_ISSUER:-https://awdhzmyieafhfpjmzwsh.supabase.co/auth/v1}" && npm install && npm run web:build && cd infra && (docker compose up -d --build || docker-compose up -d --build)
scripts.deploy:master: git fetch && git checkout master && git pull --ff-only origin master && npm run deploy:update
scripts.deploy:dev: git fetch && git checkout dev && git pull --ff-only origin dev && npm run deploy:update
